docs.title: Treat Recipes
docs.text:
=== "Tuna Bites"

ingredients:
  - 1 can tuna
  - 1 tbsp catnip
steps:
  - Mix ingredients
  - Shape into bites
  - Serve immediately

=== "Chicken Delights" ingredients: - 1/2 cup cooked chicken - 1 tsp salmon oil steps: - Shred chicken - Drizzle with oil - Serve at room temperature
